name: Warhammer 40,000: Battle Sister
summary:
For the Emperor!

Warhammer 40,000: Battle Sister thrusts you into the grimdark future of the 41st millennium, where you take on the role of Sister Ophelia, a fierce warrior of the Adepta Sororitas. Armed with the might of the Imperium’s most powerful weapons, you must fight for the survival of humanity against the forces of Chaos, heretics, and other nightmarish enemies that threaten the galaxy.
